name: Yangtzekiang Garment Limited
summary: Yangtzekiang Garment Limited engages in the manufacturing, sourcing, and trading of garment and textiles. It operates through three segments: Manufacture and Sale of Garments and Textiles; Interests in Joint Ventures; and Property Leasing. Its products include men's and ladies' shirts, trousers, shorts, polo shirts, T-shirts, skirts, loungewear, underwear and pyjamas, suits and jackets, knitted outerwear, blouses, etc. The company engages in the manufacture and sale of textile yarn products, as well as knitting and dyeing fabrics. In addition, it provides garment processing services; and leases commercial and industrial premises. The company sells its products and services primarily in Hong Kong, the United Kingdom, Italy, Spain, Germany, and other European countries; Mainland China; the United States; Canada; and internationally. The company was formerly known as Yangtzekiang Garment Mfg. Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Yangtzekiang Garment Limited in 2005. Yangtzekiang Garment Limited was founded in 1949 and is based in San Po Kong, Hong Kong.
